## Contract & tests

- [ ] Behavioral change? If yes, a `docs/CONTRACTS.yaml` entry is added/updated and names a rule-asserting test.
- [ ] `pytest tests -q` passes.
- [ ] `python tools/check_contracts.py --junit junit.xml` passes (contract gate green).
- [ ] Docs updated where behavior or API changed (README / specs / CHANGELOG).
